title: hedyotis brevicalyx
intro: Hedyotis brevicalyx, also known as Chinese fringed pink or small-fruited Hedyotis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and inflammation, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis brevicalyx include reducing fever and pain, as well as supporting the immune system, and it has been used to treat conditions such as respiratory infections, bronchitis, and coughs. Hedyotis brevicalyx is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations may include dried flowers or roots that can be used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures.
